Services Compliance Contacts

ITAD Cluster Services

Secure ITAD services in London, Manchester, Bristol with IT asset disposal, certified data erasure, WEEE-compliant IT recycling, and corporate IT buyback programs for regulated industries.

🛡️

Certified Data Erasure

Forensically verified data erasure. Certified to ADISA L2 and Common Criteria EAL3+ standards. Full NIST 800-88 and IEEE 2883-2022 compliance.

Enterprise-grade data security, built on certified assurance. From single drives to full data centres, we erase to the standard that defence and government trust. ADISA L2. Common Criteria EAL3+. NCSC recognised. Across London, Manchester, Bristol — wherever your assets are.

ADISA L2
Common Criteria EAL3+
NIST 800-88
Chain-of-Custody Guaranteed
Forensic Audit Trail
Learn More →
💻

IT Asset Buyback

Maximize recovery value for corporate IT assets. Coverage for London area businesses expanding to Manchester, Bristol. Fair-market valuation, secure collection, same-day payment.

Corporate IT buyback and bulk computer recycling programs. Fair market valuation for AI servers, GPU servers, HPC clusters, and edge computing nodes with UK-wide secure collection and same-day payment.

GPU Server Resale
Enterprise Hardware Buyback
Bulk Computer Recycling
HPC Cluster Disposal
Same-Day Payment
Learn More →
💼

Office IT Solutions

End-to-end workplace technology deployment. Hardware procurement, software licensing, professional installation, ongoing support — delivered as a service.

Comprehensive workplace technology solutions for modern businesses. From initial hardware procurement and software licensing to professional installation and ongoing technical support, we deliver complete IT infrastructure as a managed service.

Hardware Procurement
Software Licensing
Professional Installation
Ongoing Support
Managed Service
Learn More →
🚚

Secure Logistics

GPS-tracked, secure IT asset transport with international export capabilities. Refurbished laptop and server export from UK to Kazakhstan, Uzbekistan, CIS region, and Middle East.

Secure ITAD logistics for bulk laptop export, used servers export, and international IT equipment shipping. Chain-of-custody documentation for export IT equipment to emerging markets with UK nationwide collection.

Bulk Laptop Export
Used Servers Export
International IT Shipping
Export Documentation
GPS-Tracked Transport
Learn More →
🏢

On-Site Services

Emergency on-site data destruction with 4-hour deployment. Witnessed IT asset disposal, secure shredding, and bulk computer recycling at your London, Manchester, or Bristol premises.

On-site data destruction and emergency IT disposal services across the UK. 4-hour deployment for secure media sanitization, laptop disposal, and immediate IT asset destruction with certification and audit trail.

4-Hour Deployment
Emergency Data Wiping
Witnessed Destruction
On-Site Server Disposal
Immediate Certification
Learn More →

London-based ITAD provider delivering compliant asset disposal, secure data destruction, and international remarketing.
